tasks.title: scripts/audit-md-check.sh (Gate #4 / pre-flight audit MD 存在チェック)
tasks.label: NEW

functional: EVENT-DRIVEN: When `audit-md-check.sh <task_id>` is invoked with an existing valid audit MD at docs/audit/2026-05-16_v3/T-<task_id>.md, the system shall exit with code 0
UNWANTED: If the audit MD file does not exist for the given task_id, the system shall exit with code 1 and emit `audit MD not found: <path>` to stderr

UNWANTED: If the audit MD lacks one or more of the three required sections (## Tier 1: Structural / ## Tier 2: Functional / ## Tier 3: Regression), the system shall exit with code 2 and list missing sections
UNWANTED: If the audit MD contains a generic phrase matching the regex `shall implement T-[A-Z0-9-]+ as specified`, the system shall exit with code 2 and emit `generic phrase detected at line N`
OPTIONAL: Where the --self-test flag is provided, the system shall run 4 internal fixture cases and exit 0 only if all fixtures behave as expected
OPTIONAL: Where --all flag is provided, the system shall iterate all task_ids in docs/task-decomposition/*/tickets.json and aggregate exit codes (worst case wins)
regression: python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py PASS for this task entry
docs/audit/2026-05-16_v3/T-FOUNDATION-01.md exists, 3 sections present, no generic phrase (self-application)

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall extract 5 meta fields (screen-id / feature-id / task-ids / entities / phase) from each mock HTML in --mock-dir
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the impl file at <impl-dir>/screens/<screen-id>.tsx does not exist, the system shall record a drift entry with error: 'missing_in_impl' and severity: 'error'
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the meta value differs between mock and impl, the system shall record a drift entry {screen_id, field, mock_value, impl_value, severity: 'warning'}
OPTIONAL: Where the --strict flag is provided and drift count > 0, the system shall exit with code 1
UNWANTED: If the mock HTML lacks a required meta field, the system shall record {screen_id, field, error: 'missing_in_mock'} and exit 1 (strict mode)
STATE-DRIVEN: While --self-test is active, the system shall run 4 fixture cases (aligned / drifted / missing_impl / missing_meta) and exit 0 only if all match expectation
regression: python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py PASS for this task entry

tasks.title: scripts/check-wave-mutex.py (Wave 起動前の file-level mutex 検証)
tasks.label: NEW

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall parse work_package_boundary (editable / shared_no_concurrent_edit / readonly / forbidden) from each task in the specified Wave
UNWANTED: If two or more tasks in the same Wave declare the same file in editable, the system shall record a mutex_violation entry with both task IDs and the conflicting file
UNWANTED: If a task declares a file in forbidden that another task in the same Wave declares in editable, the system shall record a forbidden_violation entry
EVENT-DRIVEN: When --strict is set and any violation is found, the system shall exit with code 1
UNWANTED: If tickets.json schema is invalid (missing required fields), the system shall exit 2 with 'invalid tickets schema' message
STATE-DRIVEN: While --self-test is active, the system shall verify 3 fixtures (clean / conflict / shared-misuse) behave as expected
regression: python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py PASS for this task entry

tasks.title: scripts/wave-integration-report.py (Wave 完了集計レポート生成)
tasks.label: NEW

structural: STATE-DRIVEN: While rendering Markdown, the system shall include the sections defined in skills/integration/references/v3-core.md Wave Integration Report スキーマ (概要 / auto-merge 集計 / 連続失敗の原因分析 / drift 検出 / 統合先 git state)
functional: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall categorize each task into exactly one of {auto-merged / retried / escalated / rolled-back} based on branch-package.json.final_state
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall sum task counts by deliverable_layer field (foundation / backend / ui / polish)
EVENT-DRIVEN: When a task has failure_count >= 3, the system shall include it in the failure analysis section with gate ID and error reason

EVENT-DRIVEN: When drift entries exist in <branch-packages>/_drift.json, the system shall include drift count by rule_id; when the file is absent, the system shall report drift = 0 with a stderr warning
OPTIONAL: Where --format json is provided, the system shall emit the same data as JSON instead of Markdown
STATE-DRIVEN: While --self-test is active, the system shall verify 2 fixture cases produce reports byte-identical to expected goldens

tasks.title: scripts/generate-drift-tickets.py (lint 違反 → drift task 自動生成)
tasks.label: NEW

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall read lint violations from --lint-output JSON, expecting fields rule_id / screen_id / mock_value / impl_value

EVENT-DRIVEN: When a violation is found, the system shall emit one drift task with id: T-DRIFT-W<source>-<seq>, target_wave: W<target>, and deliverable_layer derived from rule_id (mock-impl-diff → ui / screens-API → backend / entity-table-naming → backend)

UBIQUITOUS: The system shall generate a 3-tier AC seed where Tier 1 contains the violation diff verbatim, Tier 2 specifies the alignment requirement in EARS UBIQUITOUS form, and Tier 3 contains the standard regression gate set from the project profile
UNWANTED: If the lint output JSON schema is invalid (missing required fields), the system shall exit 1 with 'invalid lint output schema' and refuse to generate
UNWANTED: If a violation has an unknown rule_id, the system shall emit a warning to stderr and skip that entry while continuing with the rest
STATE-DRIVEN: While --self-test is active, the system shall produce output byte-identical to the expected golden file
regression: 生成された drift-tickets.json が python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py --check-file <path> PASS

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall accept --phase from {foundation, backend, ui, polish, release} and refuse other values with exit code 2 and 'unknown phase: <value>'
EVENT-DRIVEN: When a criterion's tool_command exits 0, the system shall record {name, status: 'green', evidence: <command output snippet up to 200 chars>}
EVENT-DRIVEN: When all criteria for the phase are green, the system shall set decision: 'OPEN_GATE' and exit 0
UNWANTED: If any criterion fails (non-zero exit or evidence file missing), the system shall set decision: 'BLOCKED', populate block_release_until with failing criteria list, and exit 1
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the profile lacks criteria for the requested phase, the system shall set decision: 'PENDING' and exit 0
STATE-DRIVEN: While --self-test is active, the system shall verify 2 fixtures (all-pass → OPEN_GATE / one-fail → BLOCKED) behave as expected

tasks.title: .github/workflows/ci-v3.yml (8 CI gate を 4 段階 job で構成)
tasks.label: NEW

structural: UBIQUITOUS: The workflow shall declare exactly 5 jobs named gate-foundation / gate-backend / gate-ui / gate-polish / gate-summary (matching the Foundation→Backend→UI→Polish order in skills/test-verification/references/v3-core.md)
STATE-DRIVEN: While gate-foundation is running, the system shall execute steps named lint-mock / validate-tickets / audit-md-check in order
functional: EVENT-DRIVEN: When a PR is opened against main or synchronized, the workflow shall trigger and start gate-foundation
UNWANTED: If gate-foundation outputs passed != true, the system shall not start gate-backend (and subsequent gates)
EVENT-DRIVEN: When all 4 gates pass, the gate-summary job shall set outputs.passed: true and upload gate-summary artifact containing {passed: true, gates: [...]}
UNWANTED: If any gate exceeds its declared timeout (15/20/15/10 min), GitHub Actions shall cancel it and gate-summary shall set passed: false
STATE-DRIVEN: While the workflow is running, concurrency.cancel-in-progress: true shall cancel any prior run on the same ref
regression: dry-run on the present PR で 4 gate 全 pass を確認
既存 .github/workflows/ci.yml の動作に regression なし (並走確認)

tasks.title: .github/workflows/auto-merge.yml (全 gate green で auto-merge + 連続 3 失敗 human エスカ)
tasks.label: NEW

structural: UBIQUITOUS: The workflow shall declare exactly 2 jobs: auto-merge and failure-counter
STATE-DRIVEN: While auto-merge is running, the system shall fetch artifact gate-summary from the corresponding ci-v3.yml run via actions/download-artifact@v4
functional: EVENT-DRIVEN: When ci-v3.yml completes with conclusion 'success' and gate-summary.json.passed == true, the workflow shall execute gh pr merge <PR> --auto --squash
EVENT-DRIVEN: When ci-v3.yml completes with conclusion 'failure', the workflow shall increment the PR's failure counter (label failure-1 → failure-2 → failure-3)
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the failure counter reaches 3, the workflow shall apply 'needs-human-review' label and assign the PR to a configured team
UNWANTED: If the PR has 'do-not-auto-merge' label, the system shall not auto-merge regardless of gate status
UNWANTED: If permissions: pull-requests: write is missing, the workflow shall fail with clear error message indicating missing permission
regression: dry-run on a fixture PR (label simulation) で 3 連続失敗 → needs-human-review label 付与確認
dry-run on a fixture PR で全 gate green → auto-merge 動作確認
